argv: Wide low-angle hero shot: a cream-white tilt-head stand mixer with chrome trim sits centered on a thick honed-marble counter in a warm domestic kitchen. The mixer head rises slowly in ceremonial slow motion, revealing a polished stainless mixing bowl beneath. Dust motes drift through a shaft of golden morning window light. Subtle slow push-in. No on-camera text, no visible brand wordmark on the appliance body. 50mm full-frame, medium-close framings, golden-hour window light from camera-left at 3200K, deep cream-and-walnut palette with brushed-chrome highlights, gentle film grain, A24 domestic-warm grade, locked 9:16 portrait, no whip pans

Extreme macro close-up: a polished stainless spiral dough hook turns slowly inside a polished stainless mixing bowl, folding pale enriched bread dough into a glossy elastic mass. Streaks of melting butter catch the morning light and ribbon through the flour. The rotation is slow, deliberate, hypnotic. Soft bokeh background of cream-white mixer body out of focus. 50mm full-frame, medium-close framings, golden-hour window light from camera-left at 3200K, deep cream-and-walnut palette with brushed-chrome highlights, gentle film grain, A24 domestic-warm grade, locked 9:16 portrait, no whip pans

Slow pull-back reveal: the cream-white tilt-head stand mixer rests at the center of a sunlit kitchen counter beside a beautifully risen boule of bread dough draped under cream linen on a walnut wooden board. A ceramic coffee cup steams at the edge of frame. The kitchen breathes — still, lived-in, quiet. Camera drifts back smoothly, locked off, no shake. No on-camera text, no visible brand wordmark on the appliance body. 50mm full-frame, medium-close framings, golden-hour window light from camera-left at 3200K, deep cream-and-walnut palette with brushed-chrome highlights, gentle film grain, A24 domestic-warm grade, locked 9:16 portrait, no whip pans
